title: CV2 LED Display
description:
CV2 LED Display

CV2 LED Display

Each LED of CV2 indicates conditions as follows.

Power LED

Power On	Green

Power off (current applied)	Orange

Power off (current not applied)	OFF

CFast access LED

Access	Orange

No Access	OFF

Temperature warning LED

Warning (CPU temp.: exceeding 105 degrees)	Red

No warning (CPU temp.: less than 105 degrees)	OFF

PoE LED

Power supplied	Red

Power not supplied	OFF

ERROR/STATUS LED

	ERROR LED (Red)	STATUS LED (Green)

Power ON	ON	ON

OS/ firmware running	ON	ON

After normal startup of OS	OFF	OFF

After normal startup of firmware	OFF	Blink

Error	ON	OFF

Warning	Blink	OFF

Power OFF	OFF	OFF
